entry.title: How to obtain my S4HC APIKey
entry.content:
Hi

I started to write this question as I thought I needed the APIKey for a call to this API below.  I am still wanting to know that.

I want to update an element via the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER ... I have set up the comms arrangement sap_com_008 with basic authentication for this test.

According to the API Hub an APIKey is needed - that is in fact not true !!!.🙄 As I can call the API without it and it does the PATCH just fine.  But out of interest How can I get my SAP systems APIKey?🤔

In case you are interested in this part : Here is the API I am calling https://<my sap system>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner('9980000760').     This has in the Authorization tab my communication arrangements userid/password credentials.  The Headers have the CSRF token that I have obtained and it does not care about the APIKey.   The thing does post/patch just fine without it.

 

 

Here are the steps etc I took so far to obtain my APIKey

I have set a clientid/secret for OAUTH calls to S4HC API in our SAP IAS Application for our S4HANA Cloud- Test Tenant (i,e, the S4HC D5X system) and the Client Authentication attribute tab - The ClientID was already there and I have added a Secret.

I then attempt to obtain the APIKey via https://<mysapsystem>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/oauth/token

but I get a 403 - so how can I get my dang APIKey ?

entry.title: Re: SCORM file size
entry.content: I think even if SF LMS limit is quite gracious, the problem is same as with humans. The more obese the content is, it has side effects. Manually reducing sizes of videos or putting on sub CDN is one way. What I have found effective, is to use a SCORM compressor like https://doctorelearning.com , which can reduce your SCORM size directly. A smaller file size is the best solution.

entry.title: Re: Fiscal year variant mandatory
entry.content:
MM fields are assigned to field selection group and field selection group is assigned to field reference. Different field references can have different options like display , required entry , suppress etc for the same field.

Field references are assigned to material types . .

In your case mandatory and optional may be different material types

Have a look at txn OMS9

entry.title: CDS View: Using join of same table twice and call it as association in the primary view
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a primary CDS view where it has multiple associated CDS views involved (using association).

The main define view starts with one Customer CDS view (for ex: ZBP) that has Business Partner data (BUT000 and associated address data) and call it as left outer join with BUT050-PARTNER1 and BUT050-PARTNER2.

In one of the rules for a particular column as Corporate ID will be fetched based on

BUT050-PARTNER1 (as customer ID and BUT050-PARTNER2 (Group ID data) where BUT050-RELKIND is not initial. 

The above Corporate ID data logic is written as a separate CDS view and call it in the primary as associated view.

Though the above Corporate ID CDS view showing the result based on the validation but when it calls from the primary view. It writes the line of Group ID with the Customer ID where this combination doesn't exist in BUT050 since the RELKIND is initial. 

The business expectation is this line must not be written. 

I need your help, how to write and resolve this solution.

Many thanks for your time here in reading and your valuable answers, if any.

Warm Regards.

entry.title: Hear from SAP Champion Amin Omidy How Lifelong Learning Can Unlock Your Career Potential
entry.content:
@Amin_Omidyhas been reading SAP white papers and SAP Community posts for as long as he can remember, covering various areas of interest for the Solution and Enterprise Architect who works as a consultant for clients. “I am always fascinated by the rich information and great answers to different questions related to SAP implementation”, he explains. “I subscribed to different topics to receive notifications via email and actively search for mature SAP answers or related SAP notes to help me with my issues.” 

With more than ten years of experience in SAP solutions for both private and public sectors, Amin certainly knows the pain points of his customers – and how to solve them. “My expertise lies in helping businesses transition to the cloud and establishing modern ERP implementations. This can involve starting an ERP project from scratch or enhancing existing customer solutions, such as migrating on-premise solutions to the cloud or integrating new Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) applications into their IT landscape”, he says. Where else but in the SAP Community could he find answers to such complex issues?  

SAP Learning site helps solve complex problems

Amin: "I am always fascinated by the rich information and great answers the SAP Community provides related to SAP implementation."Well, there’s also the SAP Learning site, Amin admits. “Your website offers a wealth of up-to-date and practical insights, making it an invaluable resource for staying current with the latest SAP developments and best practices.” What he values the most, according to the Canadian resident, is the structured and detailed content helping him solve complex problems and enhancing his understanding of SAP solutions. “My passion to enable businesses to streamline their operations drives me to stay updated with the latest technological advancements”, he concludes.  

However, it’s not only his passion towards his customers that drives Amin to stay at the forefront of innovation. He is convinced: “Living in an era dominated by IT technologies like VMs, microservices, cloud computing, and AI, continuous learning has become essential.” According to Amin, enablement and engagement provided from SAP has significantly enhanced his ability to serve customers better. “Each new piece of knowledge or technique I acquire not only boosts my professional skills but also brings a sense of accomplishment when applied in real-world scenarios.” Watching the positive results and customer satisfaction would confirm the value of lifelong learning and its impact on both his career and personal growth.  

Making impact as SAP Champion

Maybe that’s one of the reasons why Amin also enjoys mentoring young professionals and participating in webinars to share knowledge and learn from others, even outside of work. And why he became an SAP Champion. He simply loves engaging with others, be it his customers or peers in the SAP Community. “Whether through writing blogs, addressing customer issues and potential solutions or serving as a voice for customers within the SAP ecosystem, it allows me to actively contribute and make a meaningful impact”, he recently stated in an interview.  

In return, Amin gets a lot back: “Learning something new through the SAP Community has been incredibly rewarding. The reliability and depth of the information provided are unmatched, ensuring that I can trust the knowledge I gain and apply it directly to my daily work. The opportunity to interact with bloggers or writers to verify any part of the answer or get more related details is particularly valuable. This engagement helps me stay updated with the latest best practices and solutions, enhancing my skills and efficiency in handling SAP-related tasks. The experience is both exciting and encouraging, continually expanding my understanding and capabilities within the SAP ecosystem.” 

Start your own success story today

If you want to stay informed, connected, and up to date with the latest innovations, explore the SAP Community and head over to SAP Learning site to quickly learn a new skill, upskill, and get certified. For access to our guided, premium learning resources, consider a subscription to SAP Learning Hub.

FIORI migration to SAPUI5 with BAS

I am trying to migrate a fiori app to cloud foundry, specifically Purchase requisitions professional which is in this link https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2229')/S14OP, but looking at the components it needs I realized that the application points to the components of another application which is this one (sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.accounting) https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F1643')/S14OP and I was able to launch the application, however right now it asks me for other components that I do not see in the Fiori documentation and I do not know how to obtain them which are these (sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.text and sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.oci) could someone guide me on how to obtain them so I can download and map them correctly in my ui5.yaml so that the application works correctly?

I appreciate your support in advance

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition: Call for Speakers
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that the speaker registration is now open for SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 –

Business AI Edition, taking place on September 14th, 2024.

This year, the event will focus on the transformative power of SAP Business AI, and we are seeking

enthusiastic speakers to present their knowledge and perspectives on a range of AI topics.

If you have experience in building AI applications, creating innovative business AI solutions, or working with

embedded AI in SAP products, we invite you to contribute to our event.

 

Event Details:  

Date: September 14, 2024
Time: 9 AM - 5 PM IST 
Venue: SAP Labs India, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram, Haryana 122002, India

Event Registration details: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition 

 

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition?

 

  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with a passionate and engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Enhance your professional profile and gain recognition within the SAP community.

 

Speaker Registration:

Are you ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 – Business AI Edition? Register now to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most exciting SAP community events of the year.

Speaker Registration Link: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 : Speaker Registration 

Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.

We look forward to your valuable contributions and to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024.

Best Regards,
Anuradha Dhingan

entry.title: Packaging Specification is not determined after Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do an automatic packing for an inbound delivery. However, no HU is created automatically even though I have provided correct details in the Determination tab in transaction SCWM/PACKSPEC (See below screenshots)

Packaging Specification

Condition Type: 0IBD

Level Set: ZPALLET

HU Creation: Ticked

 

Inbound Delivery

HEADER

GR Office: SCU-9902

 

ITEM

Product: 100006

 

Ship-From: Z000000034

 

Next are my configuration for the Packaging Specification Determination

1. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Maintain Structure of Packaging Specification > Define Level Sets 

 

2. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Access Sequence

Access Seq.: 0IBD

 

3. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Condition Type

Condition Type: 0IBD

Access Seq.: 0IBD

4. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Determination Procedure

Procedure: 0IBD

Condition Type: 0IBD

5. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > GR Process > Inbound Delivery > Define Document Type for Inbound Deliveries Process

Document Type: INB

Doc. Category: PDI

Additionally, I tried to pack in Inbound Delivery > Follow-up Function > Pack --- and then by clicking the "Pack Automatically" icon, my material is packed based on what I have maintained in the packaging specification.

What I am expecting is, HUs will be created automatically once Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM and not by clicking manually  the "Pack Automatically" Icon

Q: Any idea what do I miss?

 

Thanks,

Vince

entry.title: Re: 2001070576 is not in interval that is provided for th...
entry.content:
check which packaging material is used: go to vl02n - packing screen - packaging materials
2. check which packaging material type is assigned to the packaging material: Go to MM03 - Sales:general/plant view - Packaging material data - Packaging mat. type
3. check which external number range interval is assigned to the packaging material type: go to transaction VHAR - select the packaging material type - details
4. check the number range interval: go to transaction SNRO - object: HU_VEKP - display - ranges - intervals
5. he HU number used must be between the lower and the upper limit of the interval defined in step 3

entry.title: Re: FAGLB03 _Balance Differences with the monthly based balance with the drilldown details
How to edit the interest condition in Interest Rate Instrument using the migration cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to migrate an interest rate instrument using the migration cockpit. I have provided the basic data for the interest condition - condition type, condition group, effective from date, due date, etc. - under the 'Structure' tab. I need to manually set the calculation base amount for this condition, but the 'Calculation Base Amount' field is available in the cockpit template in a separate tab - 'Condition'.
I tried to follow the documentation I found, i.e. include the condition in the 'Structure' tab of the migration file - and then add additional information in 'Condition' tab, by adding row with the same 'effective from date' and condition group as in 'Structure' tab.

Documentation : If you want to change further fields for a specific condition type maintained in sheet/table Interest,
please enter the same condition group and condition item effective from date in sheet/table Conditions,
otherwise the system will try to create a new condition.

Unfortunately - when trying to migrate I receive following error: “One condition already exists with this ‘effective from’”.

Could you please point out how I can make the cockpit interpret the condition from the 'Structure' tab and the 'Condition' tab as one? What should actually be in both of these tabs for SAP to consider them complimentary and not throw the above error?

Great thanks for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Customizing OB58 in production without transport request
entry.content: It's a common requirement from business users. You can just change the status of the message FE 146 from "E" to "-" in transaction OBA5 in DEV system, then transport the Transport request to Production system.

entry.title: Re: Error while logging on to the service instance using this project.
entry.content:
Hi Bharath,

have you tried to delete the project (right-click on the project -> Delete) in Eclipse and recreate it?

The error message could imply that it was created for a different ABAP Trial User (maybe your Trial Account expired in between and you created a new one).

Deleting the project and creating a new one for your ABAP Trial service instance should do the trick.

Best Regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content: In our system the buffer in SNRO is set to 50 (object QLOSE). In order to see your change in number ranges you would have to create a maximum of 50 lots in that case in order to see your change appear. (depending on how far the numbers in the buffer have been handed out). Be aware that the buffer is handed out per SAP server. If you are running separate instances as backup servers that are kept in sync, there might be several buckets of 50 numbers handed out (1 bucket per server). This is also why you sometimes see gaps in number ranges that are filled somewhat later.

entry.title: Re: Proper way to extend standard Fiori app F2180
entry.content:
Hello,

I was not able to find a better way than don't use "Custom Fields and Logic" app. Instead I had to enhance any related CDS view (like E_InspectionLot). Also I had to enhance consumption views (C_) as well as define Metadata Extensions.

I still don't feel comfortable with this solution but I was not able to find anything else.

entry.title: Re: Risk class update in mass from BAPI or any other tool...
entry.content:
Hi,

depending on version (Cloud or On premise).

Cloud: please use the Mass Maintenance of Business Patners (App: "Manage Mass Maintenance - Business Partners") to manage the mass change. The field in scope would be:

UKMBP_CMS-RISK_CLASS

 

Please also see the solved Community Questions regarding mass change / updates to Credit Management Master Data (although they concentrate on a different field, the process might apply):

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/fscm-ukm-mass-upd2/qaq-p/6852722

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/mass-change-of-risk-category-field/qaq-p/8660678/comment-id/2814669#M2814669

 

Hope this helps,

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
Seeing the limited amount of materials you have I would not go through the hassle of archiving them but only block the usage of them. My advise would be to do this via material statuses (either on material level or plant material level) maybe in combination with distribution chain statuses. This would block all use of the materials in logistic processes. Material statuses can be set via the mass change transactions for material master.

Note that making use of deletion indicators is not really doing something if you do not set material statuses at the same time. The deletion indicator is an additional indicator that you can set in order to archive materials. In the standard system when setting a deletion indicator the only thing the system does is give a warning message, but all processes can still be performed.

entry.title: MBEW performance is
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in SAP S4 HANA OP2020 system and we are facing severe performance issue with below select statement. We are passing full primary keys still it takes huge spike on CPU consumption and time consuming statement.

IF lt_material[] IS NOT INITIAL
SELECT
  a~matnr,
  a~bwkey,
  a~bwtar,
  a~lbkum,
  a~salk3,
  a~verpr,
  a~zkprs,
  a~timestamp
  FROM mbew AS a
  FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_material
  WHERE a~matnr EQ @LT_material-matnr AND
        a~bwkey IN @LT_t001w_rg AND "This is range for BWKEY
        a~bwtar IN @LT_bwtar  " This is range for BWTAR
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_mbew_tab_n1).
ENDIF.


For example: if LT_MATERIAL has 1000 Records it takes 5 seconds to fetch data and when LT_MATERIAL has 10000 Records then it take 12 Seconds to fetch data. It is not good that a select statement is going for 5 seconds or 12 seconds.
 
One thing to notice here is table MBEW is having huge number of records in our system(no of records: 2662533622 i.e more than ~2500 Million records). Data volume could be one of the reason why performance is poor here.

1. But we would to know what SAP suggest in this case when MBEW has these many records?
2. Even though we are passing full key CPU load is really high and it is time consuming select statement?
3. Does SAP recommend to Archive MBEW table data?

P.S: We looked into MBEW it is having Replacement object MBV_MBEW(which is a CDS view MBV_MBEW) that means data is anyway pushed down to HANA DB still it has this performance issue.

Regards,
Prince

entry.title: How to transfer MASTER RECIPE with MIC inside from ECC to S4HANA through Idoc
entry.content:
Hi all.

I am trying to migrate PP data from ECC to S4HANA and have a lot of issues of MASTER RECIPE (not Routing). I established the connection between both systems, I have created partner profile and distribution model. I am using message type LOIROU (it seems this is only support for Routing, please clarify me if I am wrong).

Idoc generated successfully and sent from ECC to S4HANA but cannot post. I checked the IDOC sent from ECC and found that some information are missed  such as MIC in each phase, no destination. I wonder that whether SAP support for MASTER RECIPE or NOT. Most of answer in this community is solved for ROUTING only. Need your help to clarify me how to transfer, what message type.... I saw that LTMC template of MASTER RECIPE not include MIC inside and though that SAP is not support for MASTER RECIPE.

Please help. Thank you.

entry.title: 🟢 DevOps with SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: Learn about git-based customer lifecycle management (LM) on SAP BTP ABAP Environment which aims to combine proven and reliable ABAP LM benefits with the git-based CI/CD approach familiar to many. Watch live demos of our latest features and get an outlook on future developments.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Quality Bins - One for Recieving and one for production
entry.content: Should be doable. Although both are a 101 movement type there is an indicator if it's from purchase orders or production/process orders. Inspection types are also different (respectively 01 or 1701 and 04 or 1704). This should be enough to split the two processes.

entry.title: Re: Error: (GLT2 201) Balancing field "Profit Center " in...
entry.content:
you may have document splitting enabled and the application is not able to derive or inherit a profit center for the bank GL

in FAGL3KEH txn maintain default profit centers for bank GLs. It should work.

you should NOT make the message  as a warning , though it can also work but not in a good way.

When I click on the application route, I get this:

 

And when I access locally, this is what I get:

 

 

 

I have already tried to do it by clearing the cache and from an incognito window, but it gives the same error.

Prior to deployment, the application worked fine locally.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Error P014: Activation of Cloud Integration capability has failed.
entry.content:
Hello SAP.

I am taking the https://training.sap.com/certification/c_cpi_2404-sap-certified-associate---integration-developer-g/?.

Following this guide and things are working fine: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hcp-create-trial-account.html

Then I am trying to set up the Integration Suit Trial following this guide: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-starter-isuite-onboard-subscribe..html

In step four, I am trying to add the cloud integration capability and getting the error as seen in image 104056.

I also tried to access SAP Note 2904202: 

when redirected to 2904202, it is empty as in image 105038.

I have been unable to find anything with a similar errortype in the community.

I have tried to delete all subscriptions and then resubscribe them. I have also tried to removed all entitlements and give them again with any success.

As a last resort a tried deleting the entire trial and start a new and end up with the same error P014: Activation of cloud integration capability has failed.

Hi @InesRomero 

I would like to encourage to always use our Q&A area to post your questions
This makes it easier to follow-up:
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Preferred way of connecting to DB in case of CAP multitenancy
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently using multi tenancy feature from CAP and also using DwC. I have a question on designing HDI schemas for subscriber tenants.
Our project have multiple services that are are using multi tenancy and currently we have a separate service manager for each service. This results in x*y schemas where x is number of services with in an application and y is the number of subscribed tenants.

Is this approach correct ? I believe that in general all services (as long as they are coherent) should share same schema and hence they can use same service manager so that there is only Y number of schemas compared to above alternative.

Could you suggest which approach is better and why ? Thank you.

entry.title: Slowness in loading SAC - ODE story contents
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

At the beginning of this year,  as department we started conversion of all stories into new Optimized Design Experience mode, we successfully converted all of them  however currently we experience  slowness of content  uploading in some ODE stories, sometimes it becomes worse, we could not work on the stories in editing mode. Furthermore, we've been getting complaints recently. 

What should I do make it faster, I am open any suggestions and idea to solve this issue ASAP.  If it is neede also we can have short call to check issue together

Thanks a lot in advance!

#SAC #SAPanalyticscloud #OptimizedDesignExperience

Best Regards.

Ali Akbalik

entry.title: Batch Characteristics Field Non-Editable
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our Manufacturing client is using Batch Management. We are transferring batch characteristics values from one batch to another batch through Batch Derivation. 

Initially the Batch is created with all the characteristics values & assigned to a production order of a SFG material. Now we are flowing the Batch Characteristics values to the FG production Order through Batch derivation.

The requirement is, once the batch is created & assigned to a production order, few selected batch characteristics values should be non editable in the SFG Production Order as well as when the FG Production Order for which the Batch characteristics are copied through batch derivation.

Please suggest how few values of batch characteristics can be kept non-editable & few values editable. 

 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud – Structured Allocations migration to Data Actions
entry.content:
Hi @lucinda_araujo 

No, standard users cannot manage allocations within data actions. Please refer to the "Features by License Type" section of our help page: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/20d92cebb9f94699949f99bd54a169bd.html

entry.title: Re: Third party Service Delivery
entry.content:
Hello,

Sales module cannot cover third party service procurement and delivery. Instead, Service module will cover the third party service procurement. Refer to the chapter 4.2.1.1 #5 in the test script for the Scope Item: 3D2

Service Order Management and Monitoring (3D2)
Use item category: SEW1 in a Service Order.
Following procurement steps described in the Scope Item: 3NI
Procurement for Service Management (3NI)
I added the tag for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service.
